extraction.one_line_summary: VINGEGAARD attacked with 1km to summit on final climb, dropped everyone including YATES (41s) and HINDLEY (53s) to win Stage 7
tactical_patterns: VINGEGAARD's acceleration with 1km to summit caught O'CONNOR completely off-guard, forcing immediate 40+ second losses on GC contenders.
CAMPENAERTS solo breakaway strategy netted KOM jersey by accumulating 30 points across stage climbs before peloton absorption.
HINDLEY separated from O'CONNOR in final kilometer, gaining crucial 12 seconds on fellow Australian in podium battle.
POOLE dropped early on final climb before decisive moves, revealing vulnerability despite high GC position entering stage.

rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: positive: delivered Tour de France dress rehearsal perfection with explosive 1km-to-summit attack nobody could follow
rider_signals.YATES Adam: neutral: limited losses to 41s on VINGEGAARD but had no answer when yellow jersey accelerated
rider_signals.HINDLEY Jai: positive: closed gap to O'CONNOR in final kilometer, displaying superior climbing form when rivals cracked
rider_signals.O'CONNOR Ben: negative: caught completely by surprise by VINGEGAARD's acceleration, lost 1:05 and podium position to HINDLEY
rider_signals.CAMPENAERTS Victor: positive: executed long-range solo breakaway to secure KOM jersey through strategic points accumulation
rider_signals.POOLE Max: negative: dropped from high GC position early on final climb before main attacks began
rider_signals.MARTÍNEZ Daniel Felipe: neutral: rode with O'CONNOR chase group but lost time to top three GC contenders
